title: zeugandra iranica
intro: Zeugandra iranica, also known as Persian Ironwort, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Iran. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Zeugandra iranica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from coughs and colds. Zeugandra iranica is often prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, which can be consumed as a tea or taken sublingually to reap its medicinal benefits.
